Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Jarelys Teach]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Jarelys Teach is a General and Guild Head of the Imperial Guard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Jarelys Teach has shaved hair and icy blue eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Jarelys Teach wears red-and-black plate armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 17''' — Jarelys Teach can fly on a bird.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 18''' — Jarelys Teach is a General.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — Jarelys Teach is a threat to Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — Jarelys Teach is someone Calder Marten wants to avoid killing him and his crew.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — Calder wants something to prevent Jarelys Teach from killing them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 26''' — Jarelys Teach returned to her post behind the throne.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — Jarelys Teach returns on her Kameira bird.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — Jarelys Teach is an individual who objects to Calder wearing the Emperor's crown.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 4''' — Calder owes Jarelys Teach nothing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — Jarelys Teach is required for the Imperial Guard to admit Bliss.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — Jarelys Teach sat at one end of the table during a meeting of Guild Heads.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — Jarelys Teach killed Calder's father.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — Jarelys Teach wields the blade Tyrfang.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Meia mentions she got on the bad side of Jarelys Teach.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 22''' — Jarelys Teach fought Jorin Maze-walker.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 5''' — Jarelys Teach is the Head of the Imperial Guard and wears red-and-black armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 13''' — Jarelys Teach has the support of the Magister's Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 13''' — Jarelys Teach is on guard duty.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — Jarelys is the name General Teach is addressed by.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Jarelys Teach is the Head of the Imperial Guard and has replaced her heart with a Kameira’s.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 9''' — Jarelys Teach is a character currently in recovery from wounds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — Jarelys Teach touched Rojric Marten.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Jarelys Teach was wounded by Jorin's blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Jarelys Teach has the heart of a Bonereaver.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Jarelys Teach has a Kameira graft.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — Jarelys Teach is the Head of the Imperial Guard and is in a transformative coma.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
